user.title: Set up Claude Usage
user.description: Choose how to connect your Claude account.

reconfigure.title: Update Claude credentials
reconfigure.description: Choose how to update your Claude credentials.

menu_options.manual: Paste a new refresh token manually

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Claude Usage
reauth.description: Your Claude credentials have expired. Please re-authenticate.

menu_options.manual: Paste a new refresh token manually

auth.title: Log in with Claude
auth.description:
1. **[Open the Claude login page]({auth_url})** in a new tab.
2. Approve the request — Claude will redirect you to a page with an authorization code.
3. Copy the code from that page (it looks like `abc123#xyz789`) and paste it below.

data_description.code: Paste the full `code#state` string shown after you approve.

manual.title: Paste refresh token
manual.description: Paste your Claude refresh token. You can find it in `~/.claude/.credentials.json` on a machine with Claude Code installed — look for the `refreshToken` field under `claudeAiOauth`.

data_description.client_id: Leave blank to use the default. Only set this if you have your own Anthropic OAuth client ID.

error.invalid_token: Token is invalid or expired. Please check and try again.
error.invalid_code: Authorization code is invalid or expired. Please log in again and copy a fresh code.
error.invalid_state: Security check failed (state mismatch). Please log in again and copy a fresh code.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Claude API. Check your network connection.
